scholarships.name: Merit-Based Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Score 90%+ in previous examination; covers up to 100% of tuition fee

scholarships.name: Need-Based Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS) students; 50-100% waiver on tuition fee

scholarships.name: Sports and Extracurricular Activities Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: State/National level sports players or cultural achievements in music, art, or literature

scholarships.name: International Student Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Foreign students; 50-100% waiver on tuition fee

scholarships.name: Research and Innovation Grants
scholarships.eligibility: Students in research work; supports travel, projects, and resources
